display.purpose: Auth page app title only (28px bold).

title.purpose: Todo card titles, list item primary text (18px semibold).

body.purpose: Descriptions, form subcopy, general content (15–16px medium).

shadows.name: fab-tinted
shadows.purpose: Dashboard FAB — tinted, not neutral gray.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: shadcn default — token-based primary for general actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #ECEFF4; background: #5E81AC; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(94, 129, 172, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ECEFF4, 0 0 0 4px #5E81AC; }

components.name: Frost Action Button
components.description: Auth/login CTA and dashboard FAB — legacy hardcoded accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-frost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 48px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #FFFFFF; background: #6686B3; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-btn-frost:hover { background: #5775A0; } .ds-btn-frost:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-frost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ECEFF4, 0 0 0 4px #6686B3; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #2E3440; background: #ECEFF4; border: 1px solid #C5CDD8; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #E5E9F0; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ECEFF4, 0 0 0 4px #5E81AC; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Auth form fields — 48px tall with frost focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #2E3440; background: #ECEFF4; border: 1px solid #C5CDD8; border-radius: 10px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(76, 86, 106, 0.6); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #5E81AC; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(94, 129, 172, 0.2); }

components.name: Todo Card
components.description: Active todo list item with hover-revealed actions.
components.html:
Review pull request

Check logging changes in server lib
components.css: .ds-todo-card { display: flex; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; background: #E5E9F0; border: 1px solid #C5CDD8; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-todo-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-todo-check { width: 24px; height: 24px; margin-top: 4px; border: 2px solid #C5CDD8; border-radius: 50%; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-todo-check:hover { border-color: #5E81AC; background: rgba(94,129,172,0.1); } .ds-todo-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #2E3440; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-todo-desc { font-size: 16px; color: rgba(46,52,64,0.6); margin: 0; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: App Header
components.description: Fixed top bar on protected routes.
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 32px; background: #E5E9F0; border-bottom: 1px solid #C5CDD8; position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 50; } .ds-header-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-header-logo { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: #5E81AC; } .ds-header-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #2E3440; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Dashboard zero-state with CTA to add first todo.
components.html:
No todos yet

Create your first todo to get started
components.css: .ds-empty { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 16px; text-align: center; padding: 80px 0; } .ds-empty-icon { color: rgba(76,86,106,0.5); } .ds-empty-title { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #2E3440; margin: 0; } .ds-empty-desc { font-size: 16px; color: #4C566A; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A cool, low-noise product surface built for engineers evaluating craft. The interface behaves like a well-organized bench: every control has a place, color signals state rather than mood, and nothing competes with the task list. Depth comes from tonal layering with shadows reserved for elevation changes.
keyCharacteristics: Single sans family (Inter) across all UI
Nord palette via CSS custom properties

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Frost blue appears on primary actions, links, focus, and selection — never as decorative fill across large surfaces. Accent ≤10% of any screen.

rules.name: The Token-First Rule
rules.body: New UI must use hsl(var(--*)) or Tailwind semantic utilities. Hardcoded hex (#6686B3) is legacy drift — do not extend.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product headings use fixed px/rem sizes, not clamp().

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No uppercase tracked kickers above section headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows signal interaction or modal elevation only.

rules.name: The No-Glass-Default Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur appears on modal overlays only.

dos: Do use Nord CSS variables and Tailwind semantic colors (primary, card, muted-foreground, border).
Do keep Inter as the sole UI typeface at fixed product sizes (14–28px).
Do provide focus rings (focus-visible:ring-2) on every interactive control.
Do support dark mode with AA contrast in both themes.
Do use skeleton/empty/loading states that teach the interface.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — instant state changes, no choreographed page load.
donts: Don't use generic AI SaaS aesthetics: cream/sand body backgrounds, gradient text, identical icon+heading+text card grids, hero-metric blocks, uppercase tracked eyebrows on every section.
Don't apply decorative motion (uniform staggered reveals, bounce/elastic easing).
Don't use over-rounded cards (32px+ radii) outside the existing auth shell.
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft shadows (ghost-card pattern).
Don't introduce playful consumer-app cute (emoji UI, bouncy interactions).
Don't add hardcoded hex colors for new components — consolidate #6686B3 to --primary instead.
Don't use side-stripe borders on cards or alerts.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default card treatment.
